name: Jalapeno Cream Cheese Dip (Diabetic)
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon dry onion flakes OR 3 gren onions, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Stir until thoroughly mixed.
3. Chill and serve.
Makes 8 servings. A tasty dip with a bite. Serve with low-fat crackers or chips.
Each serving provides:
39 Calories; 4.1 g Protein; 4.7 g Carbohydrate; 0.0 g Fat;
0.00 g Saturated fat; 5 mg Cholesterol
Diabetic exchanges: Vegetable, 1; lean meat, 1/4
